completed_tasks.name: Add warp_engage (J) and look_around (Left Alt) InputMap actions
Add WarpState enum, ManualMaxSpeed/WarpMaxSpeed/WarpOrientRate exports, manual speed cap
Add _Process state switch, EngageWarp/DisengageWarp, _WarpProcess, look-around camera
Wire WarpConfirmationScreen into Main.tscn under CanvasLayer
Fix look-around steering bleed, warp Enter, slider in seconds

remaining_tasks.name: Full-phase play-test — manual cap, look-around, and warp loop

blockers.description: Task 3 is a blocking human-verify checkpoint requiring a play-test in the Godot editor

human_actions_pending.action: Run the project in Godot editor (F5) and verify all 8 warp behaviors listed in 07-02-PLAN.md Task 3
human_actions_pending.context: Implementation is complete and on main. Build is clean. Two bugs were already found and fixed this session (look-around steering bleed, warp Enter via HSlider focus). The play-test validates the full Phase 7 feature set end-to-end.

decisions.decision: Travel-time slider changed from minutes (1–60 min) to seconds (5 s–3600 s, step 5 s, default 120 s)
decisions.rationale: User requested during this session — allows short warps (30 s to nearby planet)

decisions.decision: _rawMouseDelta field added to FlightController to decouple look-around camera input from steering cursor
decisions.rationale: Bug fix: _cursor was accumulating in _Input regardless of look_around state, causing steering bleed on Alt release

decisions.decision: HSlider FocusMode set to None in WarpConfirmationScreen._Ready
decisions.rationale: Bug fix: HSlider was capturing ui_accept (Enter) via keyboard focus, preventing _UnhandledInput from firing

next_action: User runs play-test in Godot editor (F5). Type 'approved' if all 8 behaviors pass, or describe failures. After approval, orchestrator runs phase verification + code review + marks phase complete.
context_notes: Both plans are fully implemented and on main. Wave 1 merged cleanly. Wave 2 merged cleanly. Three bugs were caught at the play-test checkpoint and fixed before resuming. The only remaining gate is the human play-test. The continuation agent should: (1) receive user's 'approved' or failure description, (2) if approved — run code review gate, then spawn gsd-verifier, then update roadmap/state to mark phase complete, then present Next Up block for Phase 8.
